frame_side_info.main_data_begin.description: Negative offset in bytes from the frame header to the start of main data (bit reservoir)

frame_side_info.private_bits.description: 5 bits for mono, 3 bits for stereo

frame_side_info.scfsi.description: Scale factor selection info, 1 bit per scalefactor band group, per channel

frame_side_info.part2_3_length.description: Number of bits for scalefactors and Huffman data per granule/channel

frame_side_info.table_select.description: Huffman table selection for each region

constraints.description: Up to 21 scalefactor bands for long blocks, up to 12 per short window

id3v2.header.size.description: Synchsafe integer, 4 bytes, each byte uses only 7 bits (max 2^28 - 1)

id3v2.extended_header.size.description: v2.3: normal uint32; v2.4: synchsafe integer

id3v2.extended_header.crc_data.description: Present only if CRC flag is set

id3v2.frame.size.description: v2.3: normal uint32; v2.4: synchsafe integer; v2.2: uint24 (3 bytes)

id3v2.TPE4.text.description: Interpreted, remixed, or otherwise modified by

id3v2.TRCK.text.description: Track number/position in set, e.g. '4' or '4/12'

id3v2.TCON.text.description: Content type / genre. Can be ID3v1 numeric ref like '(17)' or free text

id3v2.TSSE.text.description: Software/hardware and settings used for encoding

id3v2.TLEN.text.description: Length of the audio in milliseconds (numeric string)

id3v2.MCDI.cd_toc.description: Music CD identifier - binary copy of TOC from CD

id3v2.PCNT.counter.description: Play counter, at least 32 bits, can be longer

labels.255: one more byte of events follows

id3v2.EQU2.frequency.description: Frequency in 1/2 Hz units, bit 15 is increment/decrement flag

id3v2.OWNE.price_paid.description: Currency code (3 chars) followed by price

id3v2.CHAP.start_offset.description: Start byte offset, 0xFFFFFFFF if not used

id3v2.CHAP.end_offset.description: End byte offset, 0xFFFFFFFF if not used

id3v2.RGAD.radio_replay_gain_adjustment.description: 3 bits name code, 3 bits originator code, 1 bit sign, 9 bits adjustment (0.1 dB steps)

id3v2.footer.identifier.description: ID3v2.4 footer, mirrors header with '3DI' instead of 'ID3'

id3v2.footer.size.description: Synchsafe integer, same as header size

id3v2.padding.description: All zero bytes after last frame, before audio data

xing.num_frames.description: Total number of MPEG frames, present if bit 0 of flags is set

xing.num_bytes.description: Total number of bytes in file, present if bit 1 of flags is set

xing.toc.description: 100-entry seek table, each entry is a byte (0-255) representing file position for 1% of playback

lame.lowpass_frequency.description: Lowpass filter frequency in units of 100 Hz

lame.bitrate.description: Minimum bitrate for VBR, target bitrate for ABR, bitrate for CBR (kbps)

lame.mp3_gain.description: MP3 gain change, each step is 1.5 dB

lame.music_length.description: Total length of the original music in bytes

vbri.toc_entry_size.description: Size of each TOC entry in bytes

vbri.toc_entry_frames.description: Number of frames per TOC entry

id3v1.comment.description: v1.0: 30 bytes; v1.1: 28 bytes + null + track

id3v1.zero_byte.description: ID3v1.1 indicator: if byte 29 is 0, byte 30 is the track number

id3v1.track.description: Track number (ID3v1.1 only, present when zero_byte == 0)

id3v1_enhanced.header.description: ID3v1 Enhanced tag, placed before ID3v1 tag

ape.tag_size.description: Tag size in bytes including footer but excluding header

ape.item.value.description: UTF-8 text value (or binary depending on item flags)

lyrics3v2.field.id.description: IND=indications, LYR=lyrics, INF=info, AUT=author, EAL=album, EAR=artist, ETT=title, IMG=image

lyrics3v2.field.size.description: 5-digit numeric string representing field content size

lyrics3v2.footer.size.description: 6-digit numeric string: total size of lyrics3v2 tag including header
